title: Founder's Associate
must_haves: 2-5 years in consulting, strategy, media, production, or fast-moving startup
Work directly with Founder/CEO as a force multiplier; design/run executive cadence
Implement automation, dashboards and reporting across departments
hard_blockers: Domain mismatch: StudioB is a VFX/branded-content digital production company (LEGO, Google, Netflix, Disney, Real Madrid) — NOT AI/crypto; Ryan's domain is crypto/Web3 + startup AI tooling
Listing leans consulting/strategy/media-production pedigree which Ryan lacks
met_strengths: Strong Founder's Associate / first-employee track record (Minima 1->30)
Operator who turns ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams
Could pitch AI-agent automation skills for the dashboards/automation mandate
one_line_verdict: Genuine FA-shape fit and within experience band, but a non-AI VFX/creative-media production company outside Ryan's crypto/AI domain — plausible-stretch, not a hard blocker.
fetch_note: Confirmed open on company ATS (join.studiob.net), posted ~Apr 21 2026, 2-5 yrs requirement. StudioB founded by creator Brandon Baum; VFX branded content.
